title: Install in-vehicle entertainment and convenience
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install in-vehicle entertainment and convenience demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install, in-vehicle entertainment and convenience systems

pcs.text: Determine job requirements according to workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures 1.3 Identify installation option according to the identified job requirements1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Select components of in-vehicle entertainment and convenience systems according to job requirements1.6 Check tools and equipment for serviceability
